reviews.review_msg:
Prof. Yang is an exceptional instructor—knowledgeable, dedicated and invested in students' learning
I took SA 870; her lectures are thorough and well-prepared. She challenges us to think critically and doesn't give easy grades
At times RMP reviews reflect personal frustrations, not fair assessments
Highly recommended for those committed to learning
She is a very helpful and enthusiastic professor, and really knows China.

i dont like this guy. he is such a big jerk. he chats with the tas when the class is doing midterm. totally disrespect to the whole class. i dont really care if he reads this. i think he should change his arrogant attitude. he thinks he is top of the world. what a shame!

my first time taking anthropology..Stacey is a good prof but sometimes sidetracks her lectures...listening about her fieldwork is good but sometimes she leaves the juicy part of the lecture for the last 10 mins and cramms everything in....
naive and disorganized, poor time management, vague and off topic, and hard marker
